attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SRC.REPORT_HEADER_ID,SRC.GLOBAL_NAME) + MAX_VAL  EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY,
  SRC.REPORT_HEADER_ID AS SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID_INT,
  SRC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  AS BK_SS_CD,
  USER EDW_CREATE_USER, 
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM
FROM
    ( SELECT ST_ERH.REPORT_HEADER_ID ,ST_ERH.GLOBAL_NAME, N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE    
       FROM
        ( SELECT REPORT_HEADER_ID, GLOBAL_NAME  FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS 
         ) ST_ERH,
           $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES N_SS_CD
       WHERE   ST_ERH.GLOBAL_NAME = N_SS_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
  )SRC
 ,(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY),0) MAX_VAL FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_EXPENSE_REPORT) SM_EXPENSE_REPORT
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM  $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_EXPENSE_REPORT SM_ER WHERE SM_ER.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID_INT = SRC.REPORT_HEADER_ID
 AND SM_ER.BK_SS_CD = SRC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT
SM_ER.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY,  
SRC.INVOICE_NUM,
SM_ER.BK_SS_CD,
SRC.DEFAULT_CURRENCY_CODE,
SRC.CREATION_DATE,
SRC.REPORT_SUBMITTED_DATE,
SRC.EXPENSE_STATUS_CODE,
SRC.MULTIPLE_CURRENCIES_FLAG,
TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS ER_VOUCHER_DTM,
SRC.RETURN_INSTRUCTION,
SRC.RETURN_REASON_CODE,
SRC.RECEIPTS_RECEIVED_DATE,
SRC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SRC.REPORT_FILING_NUMBER,
SRC.AUDIT_CODE,
coalesce( CRT_WRK_KEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999 )  ER_CRT_CSCO_WRKR_EMP_PARTY_KEY,
TRIM(N_OU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE)  ER_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
SRC.DESCRIPTION,
coalesce( AUD_WRK_KEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999 )  ER_LN_AUDT_APRVD_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
SRC.REPORT_HEADER_ID,
SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
coalesce(  ER_WRK_KEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY , -999 )  ER_FOR_CISCO_WRKR_EMP_PRTY_KEY ,
COALESCE(SRC.ATTRIBUTE4,'UNKNOWN') AS MEETING_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS SRC_RPTD_AUDITOR_NAME,
COALESCE(SRC.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,'UNKNOWN') AS EXPENSE_TEMPLATE_CD,
coalesce (SRC.RECEIPTS_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS RECEIPTS_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(SRC.ATTRIBUTE2,'UNKNOWN') AS REASONABLE_CAUSE_DELAY_DESCR,
COALESCE(SRC.REJECT_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS VENDOR_PYMNT_REJECT_REASON_CD,
COALESCE(CAST( CAST(SRC.ATTRIBUTE3 AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') , CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) ),
COALESCE(SRC.SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE, /* Newly added Column */
SRC.ATTRIBUTE5,
SRC.ATTRIBUTE6,
SRC.ATTRIBUTE7
FROM
(
SELECT
REP_HDRS.INVOICE_NUM,
REP_HDRS.DEFAULT_CURRENCY_CODE,
REP_HDRS.CREATION_DATE,
REP_HDRS.REPORT_SUBMITTED_DATE,
COALESCE(REP_HDRS.EXPENSE_STATUS_CODE, '=') EXPENSE_STATUS_CODE,
COALESCE(REP_HDRS.MULTIPLE_CURRENCIES_FLAG, '=' ) MULTIPLE_CURRENCIES_FLAG,
REP_HDRS.RETURN_INSTRUCTION,
REP_HDRS.RETURN_REASON_CODE,
REP_HDRS.RECEIPTS_RECEIVED_DATE,
REP_HDRS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
REP_HDRS.REPORT_FILING_NUMBER,
REP_HDRS.AUDIT_CODE,
REP_HDRS.DESCRIPTION,
REP_HDRS.REPORT_HEADER_ID,
'N' SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
REP_HDRS.GLOBAL_NAME,
REP_HDRS.CREATED_BY,
COALESCE(REP_HDRS.LAST_AUDITED_BY,-999) AS LAST_AUDITED_BY,
REP_HDRS.EMPLOYEE_ID,
COALESCE( REP_HDRS.ORG_ID, -999) AS ORG_ID,
REP_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE4,
REP_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
REP_HDRS.RECEIPTS_STATUS,
REP_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE2,
REP_HDRS.REJECT_CODE,
REP_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE3,
REP_HDRS.SOURCE, /* Newly added */
REP_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE5,
REP_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE6,
REP_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE7
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS REP_HDRS
UNION
SELECT
EX_REP_HDRS.INVOICE_NUM,
EX_REP_HDRS.DEFAULT_CURRENCY_CODE,
EX_REP_HDRS.CREATION_DATE,
EX_REP_HDRS.REPORT_SUBMITTED_DATE,
COALESCE(EX_REP_HDRS.EXPENSE_STATUS_CODE, '=') EXPENSE_STATUS_CODE,
COALESCE(EX_REP_HDRS.MULTIPLE_CURRENCIES_FLAG, '=' ) MULTIPLE_CURRENCIES_FLAG,
EX_REP_HDRS.RETURN_INSTRUCTION,
EX_REP_HDRS.RETURN_REASON_CODE,
EX_REP_HDRS.RECEIPTS_RECEIVED_DATE,
EX_REP_HDRS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
EX_REP_HDRS.REPORT_FILING_NUMBER,
EX_REP_HDRS.AUDIT_CODE,
EX_REP_HDRS.DESCRIPTION,
EX_REP_HDRS.REPORT_HEADER_ID,
'N'AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ,
EX_REP_HDRS.GLOBAL_NAME,
EX_REP_HDRS.CREATED_BY,
COALESCE(EX_REP_HDRS.LAST_AUDITED_BY,-999) AS LAST_AUDITED_BY,
EX_REP_HDRS.EMPLOYEE_ID,
COALESCE( EX_REP_HDRS.ORG_ID, -999) AS ORG_ID,
EX_REP_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE4,
EX_REP_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
EX_REP_HDRS.RECEIPTS_STATUS,
EX_REP_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE2,
EX_REP_HDRS.REJECT_CODE,
EX_REP_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE3,
EX_REP_HDRS.SOURCE, /* Newly added */
EX_REP_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE5,
EX_REP_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE6,
EX_REP_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE7
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS EX_REP_HDRS
) SRC
Inner join $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES N_SS_CD
                on  SRC.GLOBAL_NAME = N_SS_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
Inner Join $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_EXPENSE_REPORT SM_ER
                on (SRC.REPORT_HEADER_ID = SM_ER.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID_INT
                    AND  N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SM_ER.BK_SS_CD )
Left outer Join $$WORKDB.WI_CISCO_WORKER_KEY CRT_WRK_KEY
                on (  SRC.CREATED_BY =  CRT_WRK_KEY.USER_ID
                      AND  SRC.GLOBAL_NAME = CRT_WRK_KEY.GLOBAL_NAME )
Left Outer Join $$WORKDB.WI_CISCO_WORKER_KEY AUD_WRK_KEY
                on (  SRC.LAST_AUDITED_BY =  AUD_WRK_KEY.USER_ID
                    AND SRC.GLOBAL_NAME = AUD_WRK_KEY.GLOBAL_NAME )
Left outer Join (select EMPLOYEE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME, min (CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY)  CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY from   $$WORKDB.WI_CISCO_WORKER_KEY  group by 1,2 ) ER_WRK_KEY 
                on (  SRC.EMPLOYEE_ID =  ER_WRK_KEY.EMPLOYEE_ID
                    AND  SRC.GLOBAL_NAME = ER_WRK_KEY.GLOBAL_NAME )
Inner Join $$ETLVWDB.EL_HR_ALL_ORG_UNITS REF
                on (   REF.GLOBAL_NAME = N_SS_CD.GLOBAL_NAME
                    AND  SRC.ORG_ID = REF.ORGANIZATION_ID )
Inner Join $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT N_OU
                on ( TRIM(N_OU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE) = TRIM(REF.NAME) )
/* QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SM_ER.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY,SRC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ORDER BY SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,SRC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1  */

select 
ST_ERH.BATCH_ID, 
ST_ERH.CREATE_DATETIME, 
ST_ERH.ACTION_CODE, 
ST_ERH.ACCOUNTING_DATE, 
ST_ERH.ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,

ST_ERH.AMT_DUE_EMPLOYEE, 
ST_ERH.APPLY_ADVANCES_DEFAULT, 
ST_ERH.ATTRIBUTE1, 
ST_ERH.ATTRIBUTE10, 
ST_ERH.ATTRIBUTE11, 
ST_ERH.ATTRIBUTE12, 
ST_ERH.ATTRIBUTE13, 
ST_ERH.ATTRIBUTE14, 
ST_ERH.ATTRIBUTE15, 
ST_ERH.ATTRIBUTE2,

ST_ERH.ATTRIBUTE4, 
ST_ERH.ATTRIBUTE5,

ST_ERH.CREATED_BY,

ST_ERH.DEFAULT_CURRENCY_CODE,

ST_ERH.DEFAULT_EXCHANGE_RATE, 
ST_ERH.DEFAULT_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE, 
ST_ERH.DEFAULT_RECEIPT_CURRENCY_CODE,

ST_ERH.EXPENSE_CHECK_ADDRESS_FLAG, 
ST_ERH.EXPENSE_CURRENT_APPROVER_ID, 
ST_ERH.EXPENSE_LAST_STATUS_DATE, 
ST_ERH.EXPENSE_REPORT_ID, 
ST_ERH.EXPENSE_STATUS_CODE, 
ST_ERH.FLEX_CONCATENATED, 
ST_ERH.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2,
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_NAME, 
ST_ERH.HOLDING_REPORT_HEADER_ID, 
ST_ERH.HOLD_LOOKUP_CODE, 
ST_ERH.INVOICE_NUM, 
ST_ERH.LAST_AUDITED_BY, 
ST_ERH.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
ST_ERH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
ST_ERH.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
ST_ERH.MAXIMUM_AMOUNT_TO_APPLY, 
ST_ERH.MULTIPLE_CURRENCIES_FLAG, 
ST_ERH.ORG_ID, 
ST_ERH.OVERRIDE_APPROVER_ID, 
ST_ERH.OVERRIDE_APPROVER_NAME, 
ST_ERH.PAID_ON_BEHALF_EMPLOYEE_ID, 
ST_ERH.PAYMENT_CROSS_RATE, 
ST_ERH.PAYMENT_CROSS_RATE_DATE, 
ST_ERH.PAYMENT_CROSS_RATE_TYPE, 
ST_ERH.PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CODE, 
ST_ERH.PREPAY_APPLY_AMOUNT, 
ST_ERH.PREPAY_APPLY_FLAG, 
ST_ERH.PREPAY_DIST_NUM, 
ST_ERH.PREPAY_GL_DATE, 
ST_ERH.PREPAY_NUM, 
ST_ERH.PURGEABLE_FLAG,

ST_ERH.REJECT_CODE, 
ST_ERH.REPORT_FILING_NUMBER, 
ST_ERH.REPORT_HEADER_ID, 
ST_ERH.REPORT_SUBMITTED_DATE,
ST_ERH.RETURN_INSTRUCTION, 
ST_ERH.RETURN_REASON_CODE, 
ST_ERH.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, 
ST_ERH.SHORTPAY_PARENT_ID, 
ST_ERH.SOURCE, 
ST_ERH.TOTAL, 
ST_ERH.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE, 
ST_ERH.USSGL_TRX_CODE_CONTEXT,

ST_ERH.VENDOR_SITE_ID,

ST_ERH.WEEK_END_DATE,

(SELECT 
BATCH_ID,

ATTRIBUTE15,

ATTRIBUTE3,

ATTRIBUTE6, 
ATTRIBUTE7, 
ATTRIBUTE8, 
ATTRIBUTE9, 
ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, 
AUDIT_CODE, 
AWT_GROUP_ID, 
BOTHPAY_PARENT_ID,

DEFAULT_CURRENCY_CODE,

DEFAULT_EXCHANGE_RATE,

GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9, 
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, 
GLOBAL_NAME, 
HOLDING_REPORT_HEADER_ID, 
HOLD_LOOKUP_CODE, 
INVOICE_NUM, 
LAST_AUDITED_BY, 
LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
MAXIMUM_AMOUNT_TO_APPLY, 
MULTIPLE_CURRENCIES_FLAG, 
ORG_ID, 
OVERRIDE_APPROVER_ID, 
OVERRIDE_APPROVER_NAME, 
PAID_ON_BEHALF_EMPLOYEE_ID, 
PAYMENT_CROSS_RATE, 
PAYMENT_CROSS_RATE_DATE, 
PAYMENT_CROSS_RATE_TYPE, 
PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CODE, 
PREPAY_APPLY_AMOUNT, 
PREPAY_APPLY_FLAG, 
PREPAY_DIST_NUM, 
PREPAY_GL_DATE, 
PREPAY_NUM, 
PURGEABLE_FLAG, 
RECEIPTS_RECEIVED_DATE, 
RECEIPTS_STATUS, 
REFERENCE_1, 
REFERENCE_2, 
REJECT_CODE, 
REPORT_FILING_NUMBER, 
REPORT_HEADER_ID, 
REPORT_SUBMITTED_DATE,
RETURN_INSTRUCTION, 
RETURN_REASON_CODE, 
SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, 
SHORTPAY_PARENT_ID, 
SOURCE, 
TOTAL, 
USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE, 
USSGL_TRX_CODE_CONTEXT, 
VENDOR_ID, 
VENDOR_SITE_ID, 
VOUCHER_NUM, 
VOUCHNO, 
WEEK_END_DATE, 
WORKFLOW_APPROVED_FLAG,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS 
 ) ST_ERH,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES N_SS_CD
where 
ST_ERH.GLOBAL_NAME = N_SS_CD.GLOBAL_NAME 
AND 
NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_EXPENSE_REPORT WRK
WHERE WRK.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID_INT =ST_ERH.REPORT_HEADER_ID   AND
WRK.BK_SS_CD = N_SS_CD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

select  CR_KEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, 
TRIM(CR.USER_ID) USER_ID, 
CR.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME,
CR.EMPLOYEE_ID EMPLOYEE_ID
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER CR, 
( select  EMPLOYEE_NUMBER, GLOBAL_NAME ,PERSON_ID from $$ETLVWDB.EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F
QUALIFY               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PERSON_ID,GLOBAL_NAME
ORDER BY EFFECTIVE_START_DATE DESC) = 1 )     CR_EMP, 
$$COMREFVWDB. N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY CR_KEY
WHERE
CR_EMP.PERSON_ID = CR.EMPLOYEE_ID
AND       CR_EMP.GLOBAL_NAME = CR.GLOBAL_NAME
AND       CR_EMP.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER = CR_KEY.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID
